name: Mustard-Garlic Chicken
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. In a small food processor or blender, process the mustard, garlic, and spices until smooth. Brush mixture onto chicken, including underside, and place in a casserole dish. Sprinkle wheat germ evenly over chicken. Bake, uncovered, for 45 minutes. Serves 2.
